Field.Description: toggles whether unicode identifiers are allowed in names or not
Field.Name: allowUnicodeIdentifiers
Field.Label: Allow Unicode Identifiers

Field.Description: Specify Date library. Time Machine is date and time library for Flutter, Web, and Server with support for timezones, calendars, cultures, formatting and parsing.
Field.Name: dateLibrary
Field.Label: Date Library

Field.Description: If false, the 'additionalProperties' implementation (set to true by default) is compliant with the OAS and JSON schema specifications. If true (default), keep the old (incorrect) behavor that 'additionalProperties' is set to false by default.
Field.Name: disallowAdditionalPropertiesIfNotPresent
Field.Label: Disallow Additional Properties If Not Present

Field.Description: Whether to ensure parameter names are unique in an operation (rename parameters that are not).
Field.Name: ensureUniqueParams
Field.Label: Ensure Unique Params

Field.Description: If the server adds new enum cases, that are unknown by an old spec/client, the client will fail to parse the network response.With this option enabled, each enum will have a new case, 'unknown_default_open_api', so that when the server sends an enum case that is not known by the client/spec, they can safely fallback to this case.
Field.Name: enumUnknownDefaultCase
Field.Label: Enum Unknown Default Case

Items.default: Built in hash code generation method
Items.equatable: Uses equatable library for equality checking

Field.Description: Specify equality check method. Takes effect only in case if serializationLibrary is json_serializable.
Field.Name: equalityCheckMethod
Field.Label: Equality Check Method

Field.Description: Whether properties are marked as final when using Json Serializable for serialization
Field.Name: finalProperties
Field.Label: Final Properties

Field.Description: Set to false for generators with better support for discriminators. If true, the mapping in the discriminator includes descendent schemas that allOf inherit from self and the discriminator mapping schemas in the OAS document. If false, the mapping in the discriminator includes any descendent schemas that allOf inherit from self, any oneOf schemas, any anyOf schemas, any x-discriminator-values, and the discriminator mapping schemas in the OAS document AND Codegen validates that oneOf and anyOf schemas contain the required discriminator and throws an error if the discriminator is missing.
Field.Name: legacyDiscriminatorBehavior
Field.Label: Legacy Discriminator Behavior

Field.Description: Add form or body parameters to the beginning of the parameter list.
Field.Name: prependFormOrBodyParameters
Field.Label: Prepend Form Or Body Parameters

Field.Description: Author name in generated pubspec
Field.Name: pubAuthor
Field.Label: Pub Author

Field.Description: Email address of the author in generated pubspec
Field.Name: pubAuthorEmail
Field.Label: Pub Author's Email

Field.Description: Description in generated pubspec
Field.Name: pubDescription
Field.Label: Pub Description

Field.Description: Homepage in generated pubspec
Field.Name: pubHomepage
Field.Label: Pub Homepage

Field.Description: Library name in generated code
Field.Name: pubLibrary
Field.Label: Pub Library

Field.Description: Name in generated pubspec
Field.Name: pubName
Field.Label: Pub Name

Field.Description: Publish_to in generated pubspec
Field.Name: pubPublishTo
Field.Label: Pub Publish To

Field.Description: Repository in generated pubspec
Field.Name: pubRepository
Field.Label: Pub Repository

Field.Description: Version in generated pubspec
Field.Name: pubVersion
Field.Label: Pub Version

Field.Description: Specify serialization library
Field.Name: serializationLibrary
Field.Label: Serialization Library

Field.Description: Sort model properties to place required parameters before optional parameters.
Field.Name: sortModelPropertiesByRequiredFlag
Field.Label: Sort Model Properties By Required Flag

Field.Description: Sort method arguments to place required parameters before optional parameters.
Field.Name: sortParamsByRequiredFlag
Field.Label: Sort Params By Required Flag

Field.Description: source folder for generated code
Field.Name: sourceFolder
Field.Label: Source Folder

Field.Description: Allow the 'x-enum-values' extension for enums
Field.Name: useEnumExtension
Field.Label: Use Enum Extension
